description: The Islamic Republican Party (IRP) was the dominant political party of the early Islamic Republic, founded in 1979 by a group of clerics including Mohammad Beheshti, [Akbar Hashemi Rafsanjani](/people/akbar-hashemi-rafsanjani), and [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei). It was instrumental in consolidating clerical power and marginalising secular and leftist revolutionary factions, including President [Abolhassan Banisadr](/people/abolhassan-banisadr). Its headquarters were bombed in 1981, killing Beheshti and over 70 others. It was dissolved in 1987 on [Ruhollah Khomeini](/people/ruhollah-khomeini)'s recommendation after internal factional disputes.
editorial_notes: Dissolved 1987. Founding members include many key figures of the Republic.
